transcript.text: Thank you.
Thank you.
Oh, can you hear me now?
Okay, sorry.
I was on a different speaker, but I'm eating my lunch right now, so I'm off camera.
Okay, no worries.
Yeah, sorry about that.
I guess you have a new Procore email, is that?
Yeah, I don't really, I'm barely in the Datagrid one anymore.
We're on a different Slack and stuff like that.
Oh, okay.
Yeah, let me know if I need to set up another Slack then channel.
guess, well, I'm not sure if we set that up for you.
But yeah, I can't add you guys to the Procore Slack yet.
We have to set it up in a specific external thing that needs approval, and we're working on it, so.
Okay.
I should probably add that somewhere to this.
Okay, so today I was just going to give a high-level view because it's actually a very high level of execution to get all of this done, and so I'm just trying to get that all together.
Sure.
The first, just an update on the contract.
I emailed Audrey, and I'm trying to get more in the habit of...
So that's why I'm like, let me just confirm because the budget we have for this, now I'm like, oh, do they want it sent maybe to, let me just confirm.
Okay.
I don't know if it matters on the contract of how it's sent versus like, so then we can pay the way that that money's from the pot that money's coming from or not.
So, yeah, it's like an 11k difference just for your conversation.
That's like the verbal Tiago and Marcel agreement.
Um, yeah, so however that wants to get sorted, I know it's kind of tricky with the acquisition.
So, uh, because of that, I haven't really like stopped or slowed anything down, I think.
Yeah.
And also, sorry, do we, um, another thing I'm thinking too, cause we pay quarterly, right?
Oh, I'm not sure.
Maybe.
Okay.
Cause I'm like, if we've already paid for this quarter, then I'm wondering too, if like, or, but there's an additional payment we'd have this quarter for this, right?
Um, I guess it could be like a back pay from the, I'm trying
Figure out, like, for Q1, is there the additional amount for this, you know, this new thing?
And do we do that with Datagrid and then do the rest of your ProCore so it's, like, a little bit cleaner?
You know what I mean?
Kind of thing is what I'm thinking, too.
So I think if you could find out if there's an amount we owe for Q1, that would be helpful because I'm 90% sure we paid quarterly.
Okay.
I'll double check that and let's see.
Yeah.
Like, internally, I'll operate with that and then you can confirm, though, from that.
Yeah, exactly.
I'll do simultaneously this.
Yeah.
Yeah.
And then in terms of the contract, really, this is, like, the SoW language is probably what you just really need to pay attention to.
But it mostly just goes into the editorial content and less so about, like, all the dev work.
Because we're still going to do all the dev work, but I think this is, like, the long-term plan is the SEO content.
Okay.
So the project timeline, so I was getting a little bit away from me, and so I sat down and wrote this all out.
But I think...
I think an aggressive but realistic timeline for a full cutover is six weeks.
I think even at like GrowthX where we work, it might be quicker.
And then maybe hard launching this kind of mid-March to make sure everything's done.
And then I wrote down a definition of done for each of the pieces.
I think our forward deployed engineer that's doing the dev work, not the design work, he's on PTO right now.
So be back tomorrow or early next week, and then I'll get a lot of answers from him.
I think we're doing a full migration, and so that's like where I need to like fill in some color around the expectations and deadlines and like long-term maintenance.
So six weeks is March 16th, or is that only?
From February 3rd.
Okay, okay.
Yeah, because we've already been working on it, right?
So six weeks from that one conversation where we presented it to you and Tiago would be here.
Which I think is doable, unless that engineer.
Tells me not a chance, but I doubt he would.
Yeah, so these are all the definitions of done that we can get into.
So it's not like obviously fully, fully fleshed out, but it would be very operational.
And then I added, I created, went old school with it because it's just getting too big, the project.
So I made this project plan.
So it goes across like the architecture, migration, design, implementation, all of our different pieces of the content strategy.
Yeah.
Mostly I wanted this also like for visibility internally, but I know you care a lot, like you want blockers escalated clearly.
And so this is also how I'll do that.
So this is shared with your new email and Tiago's old email.
I don't know if that's okay.
And then, yeah, so anything right now, I don't have anything blocked on y'all.
And I'm going to have the team go through and make sure everything's fleshed out here.
But this is like the source of truth for where we are on the project and the cutover.
Okay.
Okay.
Um.

We've sort of paused publishing to build this out because I'll talk about blog in a second, but it's looking good, the traffic, and I think this is probably related to the refreshes and the acquisition.
So I'm not too alarmed with us not like actively pushing right now.
If this were to change and take like a nosedive, I would probably do something really reactive.
But until then, I think I'll just keep an eye on this weekly and make sure we're not like dipping too much during this sort of sprint.
Okay.
And then just quickly from last week, did you have a chance to look over any of the Loom?
I can go over it real quick.
Yeah, I haven't had a chance to look at that yet.
Okay.
So I'll just quickly show you the prototype.
So this is what we're looking at for the new site.
So just whatever improved UI, UX, what our agents pages look like or inputs, outputs, these will become linkable for agents for use cases.
examples.
So, yeah.
Then we're driving to our connectors hub here and then our related guides.
And so this is like, if nothing else, this is that idea of the agents being the backbone and how it routes to those other sort of activation or information pieces of the pages.
And it's like improved design in that it's like a very easy process for the user to be driven.
And then, of course, also the enablement to use the agent.
So, yeah.
So that's what we're looking at now.

Now, I think I'm just waiting on like these pages to be built out and get this taxonomy, but connectors are shaped and doing the content strategy, which is another story, like building out what these will look like based on the existing content you'll have and determining like what's native and what's not.
And then guides, this is what that'll look like.
And so this is like the more interesting pieces of content and then how they also drive to agent.
And that you'll have to look at.
Hey.

Close, or we merge it, or we probably redirect it would be the biggest one, which is a bit more complicated with moving to headless CMS, but we'll have, that's all in that project plan, like how we do that, or we delete if there's no value, and then of course we'll like make sure this all makes sense in terms of performance, so if there's like a super high performing legacy piece, we would never like do something ridiculous to that or delete it.

But anyways, I just wanted to let you know that because this has the ability to slow us down a little bit, but it's very much worth it so that downstream we don't like pay for this later because it's much harder to undo.
And then yeah, these are our content types just again, and what those taxonomies look like.
Agent forking is the one I'm pushing a little further down the roadmap, so not like MVP yet, so that's validated that cloning is technically proven.
I think we'll be fine to get this pushed once we like actually go live, and then the next.
thing on the roadmap I would put is agent forking and being able to spin up based on all the inputs and outputs from our other pieces of content.
And then just quickly, our publishing schedule, since we're basing everything on agents, the idea is like publishing is scaffolded, where we build guides that surround the agent.
And then from like on one week, and then that same week, we map the following week, which will be the programmatic and the connectors content as it relates to that.
And until we build like the full 18 agent clustering.

And then the only question I had for you, which is fine if you don't have an opinion on this, is if there's any prioritization you'd like us to adhere to in terms of agent publishing, like any data of like what's the most important to start publishing for?
So how we have the agents kind of listed currently, the first like five or six, I think are like our top five or six.
And after that.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on the website cutover plan, timeline, and blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Aggressive 6-Week Cutover:** The full site migration is targeted for a mid-March launch, with a new project plan now serving as the source of truth for tracking progress and escalating blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [**Contract & Budget Blockers:** The contract is stalled by an \~$11k budget increase and payment logistics post-acquisition. Both teams will investigate Q1 payment status to resolve this.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Agent-Centric Architecture:** The new site architecture uses agents as the central hub, routing users to related content (guides, connectors) to drive engagement and activation.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Publishing is paused during the migration. The new strategy will build content clusters around agents, starting with the top 5–6 agents based on current data.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Project Timeline & Plan

  - [An aggressive but realistic 6-week cutover is planned, targeting a mid-March launch.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Start Date:** Feb 3rd (date of the initial presentation to Kaitlin & Tiago).](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [A new project plan was created to manage the project's growing scope.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Provide internal visibility and serve as the source of truth for tracking progress and escalating blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Shared With:** Kaitlin (new email) and Tiago (old email).](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [The forward-deployed engineer (dev work) is on PTO, returning early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [**Action:** Liz will get answers on migration expectations, deadlines, and long-term maintenance upon their return.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### Contract & Budget

  - [The contract is stalled by two issues:](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Budget Increase:** An \~$11k increase, based on a verbal agreement between Tiago and Marcel, needs to be formalized.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Payment Logistics:** The acquisition complicates payment. Kaitlin will confirm if Toric pays quarterly and if a Q1 payment is due for the new scope.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [The Statement of Work (SoW) focuses on editorial content (SEO), not dev work.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The long-term plan is SEO content, while the dev work is a prerequisite for that strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### New Site Architecture & Prototype

  - [Liz demoed the prototype (from the Loom video) to illustrate the new architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Core Concept:** Agents are the central hub, routing users to related content to drive activation.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Improved UI/UX:** Cleaner design with linkable inputs/outputs on agent pages.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Navigation:** Routes users to a "Connectors Hub" and "Related Guides."](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Content Migration Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [**Process:** Merge, redirect, or delete legacy content.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Safeguard:** High-performing legacy content will be protected to preserve SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Agent Forking:** Pushed to a post-launch MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Technical validation of agent cloning is complete, de-risking the feature for a later release.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)

### Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [Publishing is paused during the migration to focus all resources on the cutover.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Current traffic is stable, likely due to recent refreshes and the acquisition. Liz will monitor weekly for any dips.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**New Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Build guides that surround a specific agent.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Week 2:** Map programmatic and connector content related to that agent.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build out 18 agent clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [**Agent Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [Kaitlin confirmed the first 5–6 agents in the current list are the top priority.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will start building content clusters around these top agents.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Liz (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Confirm Q1 payment status for the new scope with Audrey.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Get answers on migration expectations, deadlines, and maintenance from the engineer upon their return.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [Begin content clustering for the top 5–6 agents.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [**Kaitlin (Toric):**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Confirm if Toric pays quarterly and if a Q1 payment is due for the new scope.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Review the new project plan.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [Resolve the contract's \~$11k budget increase and payment logistics.](https://fathom.video/share/RbpTytsgxmvJ1EkFQegjZrWz_ypvd4DH?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

action_items.description: Confirm Q1 billing/payment for new scope; coordinate w/ Liz on invoicing
Confirm Q1 billing/payment for new scope; coordinate w/ Kaitlin on invoicing
Review Loom prototype; send feedback to Liz
